overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt exploring a grand palace balcony with ornate gothic architecture overlooking a vibrant Mediterranean-style city and lake, characterized by distinctive teal skies and cinematic lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered palace colonnade with stone columns

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the covered colonnade toward the open terrace overlook

entered.detail: row of ornate stone columns supporting the palace roof structure
tall pointed spires of the palace rising against the teal sky
grand curved stone staircase attached to the palace wall
ornate stone railing with arches overlooking the distant landscape

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered stone colonnade with tall columns and ornate spires visible ahead. The space is sheltered with marble flooring, leading toward an open overlook with views beginning to appear between the columns.

scene_state.functional_zone: panoramic palace overlook with city and lake views

events.description: exits covered colonnade into open panoramic terrace with expansive views of the city and lake
character stops walking to observe the panoramic view of the city and lake below
character resumes walking along the curved terrace edge

agents.ego_description: Geralt pauses at the overlook to gaze at the colorful Mediterranean-style city and lake below before continuing along the terrace

entered.detail: colorful sprawling city with red rooftops and towers visible below the terrace
large blue lake surrounded by forested mountains in the distance
distant mountain peaks under the bright teal sky

segments.scene_description: Standing at a panoramic palace overlook with expansive views of a colorful city, lake, and mountains under a teal sky. The curved stone balustrade frames the view as the character pauses to observe before continuing along the terrace.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved palace walkway with gothic windows

events.description: moves from open overlook into covered walkway along the palace wall with gothic windows
passes by an NPC walking in the opposite direction along the narrow walkway

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues along the curved walkway with the palace wall on the right and open view on the left

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue trousers and yellow shirt walking toward the overlook

entered.detail: large ornate arched windows with stone tracery on the palace wall
dark arched doorway entrance in the stone palace wall

segments.scene_description: Proceeding along a curved walkway lined with elaborate gothic windows on the palace wall. The path is semi-covered with the mountain view shifting to the left as an NPC pedestrian passes by in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: terraced garden walkway with potted trees and flowering plants

events.description: walkway becomes lined with large potted plants and flowering bushes creating a garden atmosphere
passes NPC leaning on the balustrade looking at the view

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks through the vegetated terrace section passing by large potted plants and flowers

notable_agents.action: person in red clothing leaning on the stone railing observing the city view

entered.detail: large mature trees in terracotta planters lining the walkway
bushes with vibrant red flowers in large decorative pots
tree with distinctive purple blossoms in a large planter

segments.scene_description: Walking through a terraced section adorned with large potted trees and flowering bushes in terracotta planters. The vegetation creates a garden atmosphere along the stone walkway with the city view visible beyond the balustrade.

scene_state.functional_zone: open palace terrace with guard post and archway entrance

events.description: exits vegetated section into open terrace area with clear mountain views
passes armored guard standing at attention near the palace wall

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks along the final open terrace section toward a large stone archway entrance

notable_agents.action: armored guard in plate armor with red tabard standing near the wall

entered.detail: large dark archway entrance leading into the palace interior
massive cylindrical stone pillar supporting the palace overhang

segments.scene_description: Traversing the final open terrace section with expansive mountain views, passing an armored guard standing at attention before approaching a large stone archway entrance ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sheltered interior of a gothic palace colonnade out onto a series of expansive, sun-drenched terraces overlooking a vibrant city. It begins by gliding along a covered stone walkway with tall columns and ornate spires, moving steadily toward an open overlook where a panoramic view of a colorful city, lake, and mountains unfolds under a teal sky. As the camera continues along the curved terrace, the scene shifts past elaborate gothic windows and a passing pedestrian, before transitioning into a lush garden section filled with potted trees and flowering bushes in terracotta planters. The path then opens further to reveal sweeping mountain vistas, passing a stationary armored guard before finally approaching a large stone archway entrance.
